$orderId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['items', 'total', 'fulfillment', 'payment', 'customer', 'status', 'createdAt']) && newData.child('total').isNumber() && newData.child('total').val() >= 0 && (newData.child('fulfillment').val() == 'pickup' || newData.child('fulfillment').val() == 'delivery') && (newData.child('payment').val() == 'cash' || newData.child('payment').val() == 'card') && newData.child('customer/name').isString() && newData.child('customer/name').val().length > 0 && newData.child('customer/phone').isString() && newData.child('customer/phone').val().length > 0
